meta.note: Rules marked experimental are not scored — they appear as reference suggestions only

core.name: Mobile Viewport Meta
core.description: Viewport meta tag for responsive design

core.name: Charset UTF-8
core.description: UTF-8 charset declared early in head

knowledge_high.name: Title Tag (Meta Title)
knowledge_high.description: Every page must have a unique title with primary keyword first
knowledge_high.suggestion: 每个页面title不同，含核心关键词，60字符以内，主关键词放前面

knowledge_high.name: Meta Description
knowledge_high.description: Unique description per page, 155 chars max, with call to action
knowledge_high.suggestion: 155字符以内，含行动号召，让用户一眼想点进来

knowledge_high.name: H1 Heading
knowledge_high.description: Exactly one H1 per page, containing primary keyword

knowledge_high.name: Heading Hierarchy (H1→H2→H3)
knowledge_high.description: H1 → H2 main sections → H3 subsections

knowledge_high.name: Image Alt Attributes
knowledge_high.description: Every image must have descriptive alt text

knowledge_high.name: JSON-LD Structured Data
knowledge_high.description: At least one structured data block (Article/FAQ/Product/HowTo as appropriate)

knowledge_high.name: Robots Meta (noindex check)
knowledge_high.description: Page should not have noindex/nofollow unless intentional

knowledge_high.name: robots.txt
knowledge_high.description: robots.txt accessible and properly configured (multilingual entries if multi-lang site)

knowledge_high.name: sitemap.xml
knowledge_high.description: XML sitemap accessible and submitted to GSC

knowledge_high.name: Internal Links
knowledge_high.description: Every page should link to homepage; homepage should list subpages; anchor text uses keywords

knowledge_high.name: Content Length
knowledge_high.description: Minimum 600 words per page for substantive content
knowledge_high.source: gefei-kb/内容策略/单页内容标准

knowledge_medium.name: Page Speed (estimated)
knowledge_medium.description: Loading speed under 3 seconds, compressed images, caching enabled
knowledge_medium.source: gefei-kb/谷歌排名机制/谷歌喜欢的页面特征
knowledge_medium.suggestion: 加载速度<3秒，压缩图片，启用缓存。详见 ux-optimization-guide.md

knowledge_medium.name: hreflang Tags
knowledge_medium.description: Proper hreflang annotations for multilingual sites (subdirectory structure preferred)

knowledge_medium.name: FAQPage Schema
knowledge_medium.description: FAQPage structured data for question-based content to boost SERP CTR
knowledge_medium.suggestion: FAQPage最常用，让搜索结果直接展开Q&A，提升CTR

knowledge_medium.name: Homepage Content Focus
knowledge_medium.description: Homepage should not bloat with full article content; maintain keyword density
knowledge_medium.source: gefei-kb/避坑指南/首页膨胀降权
knowledge_medium.suggestion: 首页保持主题集中，不要堆砌内页全文。ChatGPT4o.ai案例：首页400词→2000词后降权

knowledge_medium.name: No Back Button Hijacking
knowledge_medium.description: Google April 2026 spam policy: sites that hijack the back button face spam actions
knowledge_medium.suggestion: 不要拦截返回按钮、不要用 beforeunload 弹窗、不要用 pushState 创建导航循环

tool.description: 计算器、生成器、转换器、检查器等在线工具

extra_rules.name: Tool Result Display Area
extra_rules.description: Tool should have clear input form and visible result display area

extra_rules.name: Tool Navigation Structure
extra_rules.description: Tool site needs clear navigation: category nav, related tools, footer

blog.description: 文章、教程、指南、新闻等以内容为主的站

ecommerce.description: 在线商店、产品页、分类页

extra_rules.name: Product Schema Markup
extra_rules.description: Product pages should have Product schema with name, price, availability

saas.description: 产品官网、注册页、定价页

general.description: 未匹配特定行业类型的网站

experimental.name: Page Hero Image > A4 Size
experimental.description: Every page should include one large image (>A4 dimensions) for image search traffic
experimental.suggestion: 每页放一张大图（大于A4尺寸），冲击Google图片搜索

experimental.name: Title Brand Suffix
experimental.description: Title tag may include brand name as suffix

experimental.name: Browser Plugin for Retention
experimental.description: Tool site should have companion browser extension to retain users
experimental.source: gefei-kb/变现路径/浏览器插件+网站
experimental.suggestion: Custom Cursor案例：网站+插件，周活400万，年广告收入12万美元

experimental.name: User-Generated Content Gallery
experimental.description: AI tool should display user-generated results on public pages for organic indexing
experimental.source: gefei-kb/内容策略/内容型AI工具站
experimental.suggestion: 用户使用AI工具→内容出现在广场→Google收录→更多流量飞轮
